    Port:          <none>
    Host Port:     <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found

    Image ID:      docker.io/library/busybox@sha256:ae39a6f5c07297d7ab64dbd4f82c77c874cc6a94cea29fdec309d0992574b4f7
    Port:          <none>
    Host Port:     <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
      
    State:          Terminated
      Reason:       Completed
      Exit Code:    0
      Started:      Sun, 08 Mar 2026 15:19:21 +0800
      Finished:     Sun, 08 Mar 2026 15:19:21 +0800

Init Containers:
  init-mysql:
    Container ID:  containerd://eec92164b26485afcc402d3d3d03b51d0d45bbb81bc41ded9b8b14268443a433
    Image:         busybox:1.32
    Image ID:      docker.io/library/busybox@sha256:ae39a6f5c07297d7ab64dbd4f82c77c874cc6a94cea29fdec309d0992574b4f7
    Port:          <none>
    Host Port:     <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
      
    State:          Terminated
      Reason:       Completed
      Exit Code:    0
      Started:      Wed, 11 Mar 2026 20:32:23 +0800
      Finished:     Wed, 11 Mar 2026 20:32:23 +0800
    Ready:          True
    Restart Count:  0
    Environment:    <none>
    Mounts:
      /mnt/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /mnt/config-map from config-map (rw)
      /mnt/data from data (rw)
      /mnt/scripts from scripts (rw)

Selector:           app=nacosdb-mysql,release=nacosdb
Labels:             app=nacosdb-mysql
                    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by=Helm
                    chart=mysql-1.0.0
                    heritage=Helm
                    release=nacosdb
Annotations:        meta.helm.sh/release-name: nacosdb
                    meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: train-ticket

Pod Template:
  Labels:           app=nacosdb-mysql
                    release=nacosdb
                    role=candidate
  Annotations:      checksum/config: b90c58b7645b67552901e093109469a55f3033e6fb12ecaf096606a107f0be2f
  Service Account:  nacosdb-mysql
  Init Containers:
   init-mysql:
    Image:      busybox:1.32
    Port:       <none>
    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
      
    Environment:  <none>
    Mounts:
      /mnt/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /mnt/config-map from config-map (rw)
      /mnt/data from data (rw)
      /mnt/scripts from scripts (rw)
  Containers:
   mysql:
    Image:      radondb/percona:5.7.34
    Port:       3306/TCP
    Host Port:  0/TCP
    Limits:
      cpu:     500m
      memory:  1Gi
    Requests:
      cpu:      100m
      memory:   256Mi
    Liveness:   exec [sh -c mysqladmin ping -uroot] delay=30s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Readiness:  exec [sh -c mysql -uroot -e "SELECT 1"] delay=10s timeout=1s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Environment:
      MYSQL_REPL_PASSWORD:  <set to the key 'mysql-replication-password' in secret 'nacosdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
      MYSQL_DATABASE:       nacos
      MYSQL_USER:           nacos
      MYSQL_PASSWORD:       <set to the key 'mysql-password' in secret 'nacosdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
    Mounts:
      /etc/mysql/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /var/lib/mysql from data (rw)
      /var/log/mysql from logs (rw)
   xenon:

    Port:       8801/TCP
    Host Port:  0/TCP
    Limits:
      cpu:     100m
      memory:  256Mi

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
i=0
while [ $i -lt 3 ]
do
  if [ $i = 0 ]
  then
    echo -n "nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
  else
    echo -n ",nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
  fi
  i=$((i+1))
done

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-assurance-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-assurance-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-assurance-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-assurance-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-assurance-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - secretRef:
            name: ts-assurance-mysql
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        ports:
        - containerPort: 18888
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 400Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 2000Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 18888
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-assurance-service
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 18888
  selector:
    app: ts-assurance-service
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-assurance-mysql

GetAppYAML:{\"app_name\":\"ts-verificati:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-verification-code-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-verification-code-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-verification-code-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-verification-code-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-verification-code-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        ports:
        - containerPort: 15678
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 400Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 2000Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 15678
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-verification-code-service
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 15678
  selector:
    app: ts-verification-code-service

Init Containers:
  init-mysql:
    Container ID:  containerd://810646e9533e6792a6f7d7223b6f72ccdec9c19558d2b87df5e024531ee24f3d
    Image:         busybox:1.32
    Image ID:      docker.io/library/busybox@sha256:ae39a6f5c07297d7ab64dbd4f82c77c874cc6a94cea29fdec309d0992574b4f7
    Port:          <none>
    Host Port:     <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found

    Port:       <none>
    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
      
    Environment:  <none>
    Mounts:
      /mnt/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /mnt/config-map from config-map (rw)
      /mnt/data from data (rw)
      /mnt/scripts from scripts (rw)
  Containers:
   mysql:
    Image:      radondb/percona:5.7.34
    Port:       3306/TCP
    Host Port:  0/TCP
    Limits:
      cpu:     500m
      memory:  1Gi
    Requests:
      cpu:      100m
      memory:   256Mi
    Liveness:   exec [sh -c mysqladmin ping -uroot] delay=30s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Readiness:  exec [sh -c mysql -uroot -e "SELECT 1"] delay=10s timeout=1s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Environment:
      MYSQL_REPL_PASSWORD:  <set to the key 'mysql-replication-password' in secret 'nacosdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
      MYSQL_DATABASE:       nacos
      MYSQL_USER:           nacos
      MYSQL_PASSWORD:       <set to the key 'mysql-password' in secret 'nacosdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
    Mounts:
      /etc/mysql/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /var/lib/mysql from data (rw)
      /var/log/mysql from logs (rw)

    Image:      radondb/xenon:1.1.5-helm

    Host Port:  0/TCP

      cpu:     100m
      memory:  256Mi

    Mounts:

    Environment:  <none>

   init-mysql:
    Image:      busybox:1.32
    Port:       <none>
    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found

apiVersion: v1
data:
  create-peers.sh: |
    #!/bin/sh
    set -eu
    i=0
    while [ $i -lt 3 ]
    do
      if [ $i = 0 ]
      then
        echo -n "nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
      else
        echo -n ",nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
      fi
      i=$((i+1))
    done
  leader-start.sh: |
    #!/usr/bin/env bash
    curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
    --cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
    -d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "leader"}]'
  leader-stop.sh: |
    #!/usr/bin/env bash
    curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
    --cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
    -d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "follower"}]'
  node.cnf: |
    [mysqld]
    default_storage_engine=InnoDB
    max_connections=65535
  server-id.cnf: |
    [mysqld]
    server-id=@@SERVER_ID@@

    curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
    --cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
    -d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "follower"}]'
  node.cnf: |
    [mysqld]
    default_storage_engine=InnoDB
    max_connections=65535
  server-id.cnf: |
    [mysqld]
    server-id=@@SERVER_ID@@
